document.source_title: Prabhsimran Singh makes emotional plea to Punjab Kings fans ahead of MI clash

claims.claim_text: Prabhsimran Singh urges fans to support Punjab Kings.
claims.evidence_text: I can only say that your support is very important to us. Support us and turn Dharamsala red.

entities.name: Punjab Kings
entities.description: Cricket team in the Indian Premier League.
entities.evidence_text: Punjab Kings opener Prabhsimran Singh has posted an impassioned plea for the team’s fans.

entities.name: Prabhsimran Singh
entities.evidence_text: Prabhsimran has scored 382 runs in 11 matches for the franchise so far this season.

entities.evidence_text: The next match is against Mumbai; we have to win it and make a comeback from there.

entities.evidence_text: thanks to their 82-run defeat against the Gujarat Titans.
